name: Error handling and validation
description: User wants to verify the CLI properly validates inputs and shows helpful errors.
user_intent: Test that the CLI handles errors properly. Try creating an endpoint without a name, and try deleting a pod without --yes. I want to see that it gives clear error messages.
expected_outcome: Agent attempts invalid commands and observes clear error messages. Missing required flags produce actionable errors. Destructive ops without --yes are rejected.
